p.strong: Engineering Specification: Intel x86-64 Memory Model Implementation
p.em: Protocol: Logical Mark → Physical Unlink → Deferred Reclamation (RCU/Hazard Pointers)

g.text: Next Pointer (Mark Bit at Bit 0) [8 Bytes]

div.p: Lock-Freedom Guarantee: If any thread (e.g., a concurrent Find) encounters a node with the Mark Bit set, it MUST attempt to complete Phase 2 (Unlink) before continuing its own operation.
The Atomic Moment of Deletion: The delete is technically "complete" at the moment the Mark Bit is set in Phase 1. Subsequent unlinking is merely cleanup.
